mora biti ili JS plugin ili kompletno kodirano, we need to get this done twin, lets do this for now Potpuno funkcionalne stranice za pregled, pretragu, unos, uređivanje i\nbrisanje entiteta gdje poslovna pravila dopuštaju\nSvaka stranica koja prikazuje listu podataka treba imati AJAX pretragu\nAko neki CRUD endpoint ne radi ispravno, oduzimaju se bodovi and next lets ready up for this Dropdown s autocomplete opcijom\nNapraviti custom kontrolu koja omogućuje pretragu povezanih podataka,\nprimjerice gradova ili korisnika, a ponaša se kao dropdown\nAutocomplete mora koristiti AJAX za asinkrono dohvaćanje rezultata sa\nservera, since we need to have validation take a look at this Validacija - {"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Repositories/PlayerEfRepository.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Repositories;\n\npublic class PlayerEfRepository : IPlayerRepository\n{\n    private readonly CasinoDbContext _db;\n\n    public PlayerEfRepository(CasinoDbContext db) => _db = db;\n\n    public List<Player> GetAll() =>\n        _db.Players.ToList();\n\n    public Player? GetById(int id) =>\n        _db.Players\n           .Include(p => p.Transactions)\n           .Include(p => p.Reservations).ThenInclude(r => r.Table)\n           .FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n\n    public void Create(Player player)\n    {\n        _db.Players.Add(player);\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public void Update(Player player)\n    {\n        _db.Entry(player).State = EntityState.Modified;\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public void Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var player = _db.Players.Find(id);\n        if (player is null) return;\n        _db.Players.Remove(player);\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public List<Player> Search(string q) =>\n        _db.Players\n           .Where(p => p.FirstName.Contains(q) || p.LastName.Contains(q) || p.Email.Contains(q))\n           .Take(20)\n           .ToList();\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DEK9iWry5oZNav9j6RRtaN"}
{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Repositories/CasinoEfRepository.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Repositories;\n\npublic class CasinoEfRepository : ICasinoRepository\n{\n    private readonly CasinoDbContext _db;\n\n    public CasinoEfRepository(CasinoDbContext db) => _db = db;\n\n    public List<Casino> GetAll() =>\n        _db.Casinos\n           .Include(c => c.Tables).ThenInclude(t => t.Game)\n           .Include(c => c.Employees)\n           .ToList();\n\n    public Casino? GetById(int id) =>\n        _db.Casinos\n           .Include(c => c.Tables).ThenInclude(t => t.Game)\n           .Include(c => c.Employees)\n           .FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);\n\n    public void Create(Casino casino)\n    {\n        _db.Casinos.Add(casino);\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public void Update(Casino casino)\n    {\n        _db.Entry(casino).State = EntityState.Modified;\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public void Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var casino = _db.Casinos.Find(id);\n        if (casino is null) return;\n        _db.Casinos.Remove(casino);\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public List<Casino> Search(string q) =>\n        _db.Casinos\n           .Where(c => c.Name.Contains(q) || c.Address.Contains(q))\n           .Take(20)\n           .ToList();\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01De9L8mE4uTKu567f1qTzUa"}

GetById(int id) =>\n        _db.Games\n           .Include(g => g.Tables)\n           .FirstOrDefault(g => g.Id == id);\n\n    public void Create(Game game)\n    {\n        _db.Games.Add(game);\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public void Update(Game game)\n    {\n        _db.Entry(game).State = EntityState.Modified;\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public void Delete(int id)\n    {\n        var game = _db.Games.Find(id);\n        if (game is null) return;\n        _db.Games.Remove(game);\n        _db.SaveChanges();\n    }\n\n    public List<Game> Search(string q) =>\n        _db.Games\n           .Where(g => g.Name.Contains(q) || g.Description.Contains(q))\n           .Take(20)\n           .ToList();\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Uo2EC1o9DozPpYoG9xkbFo"}

aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Repositories;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers;\n\n[Route(\"igraci\")]\npublic class PlayerController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly IPlayerRepository _repo;\n\n    public PlayerController(IPlayerRepository repo) => _repo = repo;\n\n    [Route(\"\")]\n    public IActionResult Index() => View(_repo.GetAll());\n\n    [Route(\"{id:int}\")]\n    public IActionResult Details(int id)\n    {\n        var player = _repo.GetById(id);\n        if (player is null) return NotFound();\n        return View(player);\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"novi\")]\n    public IActionResult Create() => View(new Player());\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"novi\")]\n    public IActionResult Create(Player player)\n    {\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid) return View(player);\n        _repo.Create(player);\n        return RedirectToAction(\"Details\", new { id = player.Id });\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"{id:int}/uredi\")]\n    public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n    {\n        var player = _repo.GetById(id);\n        if (player is null) return NotFound();\n        return View(player);\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"{id:int}/uredi\")]\n    public IActionResult Edit(int id, Player player)\n    {\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid) return View(player);\n        _repo.Update(player);\n        return RedirectToAction(\"Details\", new { id });\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"{id:int}/obrisi\")]\n    public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n    {\n        _repo.Delete(id);\n        return RedirectToAction(\"Index\");\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"pretraga\")]\n    public IActionResult Search(string q)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(q)) return Json(new List<object>());\n        var results = _repo.Search(q).Select(p => new\n        {\n            id = p.Id,\n            label = $\"{p.FirstName} {p.LastName}\",\n            email = p.Email,\n            balance = p.Balance\n        });\n        return Json(results);\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"autocomplete\")]\n    public IActionResult Autocomplete(string q)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(q)) return Json(new List<object>());\n        var results = _repo.Search(q).Select(p => new\n        {\n            id = p.Id,\n            label = $\"{p.FirstName} {p.LastName} ({p.Email})\"\n        });\n        return {"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"description":"Lab 3 full UI implementation: AJAX search, CRUD forms, autocomplete widget, validation","prompt":"You are building out Lab 3 for an ASP.NET MVC Casino Management app. The backend (controllers, repos, models) is fully implemented. Your job is to create/update all Views, CSS, and JS. Here is the complete spec.\n\n---\n\n## Tech stack\n- ASP.NET Core MVC with Razor views\n- jQuery already included (`/lib/jquery/dist/jquery.min.js`)\n- Bootstrap already included (`/lib/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js`)\n- jQuery Validate + Unobtrusive already included (`/lib/jquery-validation/`, `/lib/jquery-validation-unobtrusive/`)\n- Custom dark casino theme: `casino.css` (see CSS classes below)\n- `_ValidationScriptsPartial.cshtml` already exists (loads jquery.validate + unobtrusive)\n\n## Available CSS classes (do not change casino.css except for adding new rules)\nKey existing classes:\n- `.entity-grid`, `.entity-card`, `.card-title`, `.card-meta`, `.card-footer-bar` – card grid layout\n- `.edit-form-wrap`, `.form-field`, `.form-label`, `.form-input`, `.form-validation`, `.form-actions` – forms\n- `.btn`, `.btn-primary`, `.btn-accent`, `.btn-back` – buttons\n- `.detail-section`, `.detail-row`, `.detail-label`, `.detail-value` – detail pages\n- `.data-table`, `.mono` – table layout\n- `.breadcrumb-bar`, `.breadcrumb-sep`, `.current` – breadcrumbs\n- `.badge`, `.badge-available`, `.badge-unavailable`, `.badge-purple`, `.badge-tx-danger` – badges\n- `.page-title` – `h1` heading\n- Color vars: `--lime`, `--purple-hi`, `--muted`, `--text`, `--danger`, `--panel`\n\n## Routing (important for links and form actions)\nAll routes use attribute routing:\n- Players: `/igraci`, `/igraci/{id}`, `/igraci/novi`, `/igraci/{id}/uredi`, POST `/igraci/{id}/obrisi`\n- Casinos: `/kasina`, `/kasina/{id}`, `/kasina/novi`, `/kasina/{id}/uredi`, POST `/kasina/{id}/obrisi`\n- Games: `/igre`, `/igre/{id}`, `/igre/nova`, `/igre/{id}/uredi`, POST `/igre/{id}/obrisi`\n- Tables: `/stolovi`, `/stolovi/{id}`, `/stolovi/novi`, `/stolovi/{id}/uredi`, POST `/stolovi/{id}/obrisi`\n- Employees: `/djelatnici`, `/djelatnici/{id}`, `/djelatnici/novi`, `/djelatnici/{id}/uredi`, POST `/djelatnici/{id}/obrisi`\n- Reservations: `/rezervacije`, `/rezervacije/{id}`, `/rezervacije/nova`, POST `/rezervacije/{id}/obrisi`\n- Transactions: `/transakcije`, `/transakcije/nova`\n\nAJAX search endpoints (return JSON):\n- `/igraci/pretraga?q=...`\n- `/kasina/pretraga?q=...`\n- `/igre/pretraga?q=...`\n- `/stolovi/pretraga?q=...`\n- `/djelatnici/pretraga?q=...`\n- `/rezervacije/pretraga?q=...`\n- `/transakcije/pretraga?q=...`\n\nAJAX autocomplete endpoints (return `[{id, label}]`):\n- `/igraci/autocomplete?q=...` – returns player suggestions\n- `/kasina/autocomplete?q=...` – returns casino suggestions\n- `/igre/autocomplete?q=...` – returns game suggestions\n- `/stolovi/autocomplete?q=...` – returns table suggestions\n\n## Models (for @model directives and field names)\n\n```csharp\nPlayer { Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, DateOfBirth, Balance, Transactions, Reservations }\nCasino { Id, Name, Address, LicenseNumber, FoundedDate, Tables, Employees }\nGame { Id, Name, Type (GameType enum), MinBet, MaxBet, Description, Tables }\nTable { Id, TableNumber, IsAvailable, MinBet, MaxBet, CasinoId, Casino, GameId, Game, Reservations }\nEmployee { Id, FirstName, LastName, Position, CasinoId, Casino }\nReservation { Id, ReservedAt, PlayerId, Player, TableId, Table }\nTransaction { Id, Amount, Type (TransactionType enum), CreatedAt, PlayerId, Player }\n\nenum GameType { Slots, Poker, Blackjack, Roulette }\nenum TransactionType { Deposit, Withdrawal, Bet, Win }\n```\n\n---\n\n## WHAT TO BUILD\n\n### 1. AJAX Search bar on every Index page\n\nEvery list page must have a text input at the top. As the user types (debounced 300ms), it calls the search endpoint and replaces the card/row list with matching results rendered in JS. Show \"No results\" if empty. The full list shows on load and also when the search is cleared.\n\nPattern for the search bar HTML (add above `.entity-grid` or table):\n```html\n<div class=\"search-bar\">\n  <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" class=\"form-input\" placeholder=\"Pretraga...\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n</div>\n```\n\nFor each Index page, the JS renders the results using a template function that matches the existing card style.\n\n### 2. Autocomplete dropdown partial view\n\nCreate `Views/Shared/_Autocomplete.cshtml` — a reusable partial view for an autocomplete text input that picks a related entity and stores the selected ID in a hidden field.\n\nParameters passed via `ViewData` when rendering:\n- `ViewData[\"FieldId\"]` – the hidden input's name/id (e.g. \"PlayerId\")\n- `ViewData[\"FieldLabel\"]` – visible label text\n- `ViewData[\"EndpointUrl\"]` – AJAX URL (e.g. `/igraci/autocomplete`)\n- `ViewData[\"CurrentText\"]` – pre-fill text when editing (e.g. \"John Doe (john@x.com)\")\n- `ViewData[\"CurrentId\"]` – pre-fill hidden value when editing\n\nThe partial renders:\n1. A hidden `<input type=\"hidden\" name=\"@fieldId\" id=\"@fieldId\" value=\"@currentId\" />`\n2. A visible text input with autocomplete behavior\n3. A dropdown list that appears below the text input showing matching results\n4. When user picks a result, the text input shows the label and the hidden input gets the id\n5. Validate on blur: if no ID is selected (hidden input empty), show error\n\nUse this CSS for the autocomplete (add to casino.css):\n```css\n.autocomplete-wrap { position: relative; }\n.autocomplete-list {\n  position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;\n  background: #1d1a2f; border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.4);\n  border-radius: 8px; max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto;\n  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display: none;\n}\n.autocomplete-item {\n  padding: 0.55rem 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text); font-size: 0.9rem;\n}\n.autocomplete-item:hover, .autocomplete-item.active { background: rgba(139,212,80,0.12); color: var(--lime); }\n.autocomplete-error { color: var(--danger); font-size: 0.8rem; min-height: 1.1em; }\n```\n\n### 3. Create/Edit forms for all entities\n\n**Validation requirements:**\n- Every field with a `[Required]` attribute must show validation on blur (not just on submit)\n- Include `<partial name=\"_ValidationScriptsPartial\" />` in `@section Scripts`\n- Add `novalidate` to form (let jQuery validate handle it)\n- Validation messages appear below the field in `.form-validation` span\n- Server-side errors are handled by ModelState and shown via `asp-validation-for`\n\n**Player Create** (`Views/Player/Create.cshtml`) — `@model Player`\nFields: FirstName, LastName, Email, DateOfBirth (type=\"date\"), Balance (type=\"number\" step=\"0.01\")\n\n**Player Edit** (`Views/Player/Edit.cshtml`) — already exists, UPDATE IT:\n- Add `novalidate` to form\n- Keep existing fields\n- In `@section Scripts`, trigger validation on blur:\n```js\n$('.form-input').on('blur', function() { $(this).valid(); });\n```\n\n**Casino Create** (`Views/Casino/Create.cshtml`) — `@model Casino`\nFields: Name, Address, LicenseNumber, FoundedDate (type=\"date\")\n\n**Casino Edit** (`Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml`) — `@model Casino`\nFields: same as Create + hidden Id\n\n**Game Create** (`Views/Game/Create.cshtml`) — `@model Game`\nFields: Name, Type (select dropdown with all GameType values), MinBet (number), MaxBet (number), Description (textarea)\n\n**Game Edit** (`Views/Game/Edit.cshtml`) — `@model Game`\nSame fields + hidden Id\n\n**Table Create** (`Views/Table/Create.cshtml`) — `@model Table`\nFields: TableNumber, IsAvailable (checkbox), MinBet, MaxBet\n+ Autocomplete for Casino (hidden `CasinoId`, autocomplete URL `/kasina/autocomplete`)\n+ Autocomplete for Game (hidden `GameId`, autocomplete URL `/igre/autocomplete`)\n\nUse the `_Autocomplete` partial twice:\n```razor\n@await Html.PartialAsync(\"_Autocomplete\", null, new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData) {\n    { \"FieldId\", \"CasinoId\" }, { \"FieldLabel\", \"Casino\" },\n    { \"EndpointUrl\", \"/kasina/autocomplete\" }, { \"CurrentText\", \"\" }, { \"CurrentId\", \"\" }\n})\n```\n\n**Table Edit** (`Views/Table/Edit.cshtml`) — `@model Table`\nSame but pre-fill CurrentText with `Model.Casino?.Name` and CurrentId with `Model.CasinoId`\n\n**Employee Create** (`Views/Employee/Create.cshtml`) — `@model Employee`\nFields: FirstName, LastName, Position\n+ Autocomplete for Casino\n\n**Employee Edit** (`Views/Employee/Edit.cshtml`) — `@model Employee`\nSame + pre-fill Casino autocomplete\n\n**Reservation Create** (`Views/Reservation/Create.cshtml`) — `@model Reservation`\nFields: ReservedAt (type=\"datetime-local\")\n+ Autocomplete for Player (hidden `PlayerId`, URL `/igraci/autocomplete`)\n+ Autocomplete for Table (hidden `TableId`, URL `/stolovi/autocomplete`)\n\n**Transaction Create** (`Views/Transaction/Create.cshtml`) — `@model Transaction`\nFields: Amount, Type (select dropdown with all TransactionType values), CreatedAt (type=\"datetime-local\")\n+ Autocomplete for Player (hidden `PlayerId`, URL `/igraci/autocomplete`)\n\n### 4. Update all Index pages to include CRUD links\n\nEvery Index page must have:\n- A \"Dodaj novi\" / \"Nova rezervacija\" button linking to the Create page\n- On each card/row: \"Uredi\" and \"Obriši\" buttons\n- Delete must be a form POST to the delete route (not a GET link)\n- Transaction Index: only \"Nova transakcija\" button (no edit/delete per business rules)\n\nFor the Delete button use this pattern:\n```html\n<form asp-action=\"Delete\" asp-route-id=\"@item.Id\" method=\"post\" class=\"d-inline\" \n      onsubmit=\"return confirm('Jesi li siguran?')\">\n  @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n  <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>\n</form>\n```\n\nSince Index pages use attribute routing (e.g. POST `/igraci/{id}/obrisi`), use explicit `asp-route` form:\n```html\n<form method=\"post\" action=\"/igraci/@player.Id/obrisi\" onsubmit=\"return confirm('Jesi li siguran?')\">\n  @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n  <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>\n</form>\n```\n\n### 5. Update Details pages to add Edit/Delete buttons\n\nEach Details page should have action buttons at the bottom linking to Edit and a Delete form.\n\n### 6. Update the layout navbar\n\n`Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` — update nav links to use the new attribute routes:\n- Casino → `/kasina`\n- Player → `/igraci`  \n- Table → `/stolovi`\n- Game → `/igre`\n- Employee → `/djelatnici`\n- Reservation → `/rezervacije`\n- Transaction → add `/transakcije` link\n\n---\n\n## Validation on-blur script pattern (include in every Create/Edit form)\nIn `@section Scripts`:\n```js\n@section Scripts {\n    <partial name=\"_ValidationScriptsPartial\" />\n    <script>\n        $(function () {\n            $('form').validate({ onfocusout: function(el) { this.element(el); } });\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Files to create/update:\n1. `Views/Shared/_Autocomplete.cshtml` (new)\n2. `Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` (update nav links + add {"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"aca2d7e559e73317e","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Shared/_Autocomplete.cshtml","content":"@* Reusable autocomplete input for picking a related entity.\n   Required ViewData keys: FieldId, FieldLabel, EndpointUrl, CurrentText, CurrentId *@\n@{\n    var fieldId      = (string)ViewData[\"FieldId\"]      ?? \"\";\n    var fieldLabel   = (string)ViewData[\"FieldLabel\"]   ?? \"\";\n    var endpointUrl  = (string)ViewData[\"EndpointUrl\"]  ?? \"\";\n    var currentText  = (string)ViewData[\"CurrentText\"]  ?? \"\";\n    var currentId    = (string)ViewData[\"CurrentId\"]    ?? \"\";\n    var textInputId  = fieldId + \"_text\";\n    var listId       = fieldId + \"_list\";\n    var errorId      = fieldId + \"_error\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"form-field\">\n    <label class=\"form-label\" for=\"@textInputId\">@fieldLabel</label>\n    <div class=\"autocomplete-wrap\">\n        <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"@fieldId\" id=\"@fieldId\" value=\"@currentId\" />\n        <input type=\"text\"\n               id=\"@textInputId\"\n               class=\"form-input\"\n               placeholder=\"Pretraži @fieldLabel...\"\n               value=\"@currentText\"\n               autocomplete=\"off\" />\n        <div class=\"autocomplete-list\" id=\"@listId\"></div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"autocomplete-error\" id=\"@errorId\"></div>\n</div>\n\n<script>\n(function () {\n    var fieldId     = '@fieldId';\n    var textInputId = '@textInputId';\n    var listId      = '@listId';\n    var errorId     = '@errorId';\n    var endpoint    = '@endpointUrl';\n    var debounceTimer;\n\n    var $textInput = $('#' + textInputId);\n    var $hidden    = $('#' + fieldId);\n    var $list      = $('#' + listId);\n    var $error     = $('#' + errorId);\n\n    $textInput.on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        $hidden.val('');\n        if (!q) { $list.hide().empty(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () { fetchSuggestions(q); }, 300);\n    });\n\n    $textInput.on('blur', function () {\n        setTimeout(function () { $list.hide(); }, 200);\n        if (!$hidden.val()) {\n            $error.text('@fieldLabel je obavezan.');\n        }\n    });\n\n    $textInput.on('focus', function () {\n        $error.text('');\n    });\n\n    function fetchSuggestions(q) {\n        $.getJSON(endpoint, { q: q }, function (data) {\n            $list.empty();\n            if (!data || !data.length) {\n                $list.append('<div class=\"autocomplete-item\" style=\"color:var(--muted);\">Nema rezultata</div>');\n            } else {\n                $.each(data, function (i, item) {\n                    var $item = $('<div class=\"autocomplete-item\"></div>').text(item.label);\n                    $item.on('mousedown', function (e) {\n                        e.preventDefault();\n                        $hidden.val(item.id);\n                        $textInput.val(item.label);\n                        $error.text('');\n                        $list.hide().empty();\n                    });\n                    $list.append($item);\n                });\n            }\n            $list.show();\n        });\n    }\n})();\n</script>\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AjC1ru4EHSsieKqbANWHYk"}

() {\n    var debounceTimer;\n    var $grid = $('#entityGrid');\n\n    function renderPlayers(players) {\n        if (!players || players.length === 0) {\n            $grid.html('<p '<span class=\"badge badge-purple\">High Roller</span>' : '';\n            html += '<div class=\"entity-card-wrap\">' +\n                '<a class=\"entity-card\" href=\"/igraci/' + p.id + '\">' +\n                '<div class=\"card-header\"><span class=\"card-title\">' + p.firstName + ' ' + p.lastName + '</span>' + badge + '</div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-meta\">' +\n                '<div>' + p.email + '</div>' +\n                '<div>Balance: <span class=\"mono\">' + p.balance + '</span></div>' +\n                '</div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-footer-bar\">' + (p.reservationCount || 0) + ' rezervacija · ' + (p.transactionCount || 0) + ' transakcija</div>' +\n                '</a>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-actions\">' +\n                '<a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/igraci/' + p.id + '/uredi\">Uredi</a>' +\n                '<form method=\"post\" action=\"/igraci/' + p.id + '/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm(\\'Jesi li siguran?\\')\">' +\n                '<input name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\" type=\"hidden\" value=\"' + $('input[name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\"]').first().val() + '\" />' +\n                '<button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>' +\n                '</form></div></div>';\n        });\n        $grid.html(html);\n    }\n\n    $('#searchInput').on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        if (!q) { location.reload(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n            $.getJSON('/igraci/pretraga', { q: q }, function (data) { renderPlayers(data); });\n        }, 300);\n    });\n});\n</script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GGBk6LRuALAggs3A1hFmwH"}

{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"aca2d7e559e73317e","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Casino/Index.cshtml","content":"@* Lists all casinos as cards with address, license, founded date, table/staff counts, search, and CRUD actions. *@\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Casino>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Casinos\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Casinos</span>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"index-action-bar\">\n    <h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Casinos</h1>\n    <a class=\"btn btn-primary\" href=\"/kasina/novi\">Dodaj novi casino</a>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"search-bar\">\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" class=\"form-input\" placeholder=\"Pretraga casina...\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"entity-grid\" id=\"entityGrid\">\n    @foreach (var casino in Model)\n    {\n        var availableCount = casino.Tables.Count(t => t.IsAvailable);\n        <div class=\"entity-card-wrap\">\n            <a class=\"entity-card\" href=\"/kasina/@casino.Id\">\n                <div class=\"card-header\">\n                    <span class=\"card-title\">@casino.Name</span>\n                    @if (availableCount > 0)\n                    {\n                        <span class=\"badge badge-available\">@availableCount slobodnih</span>\n                    }\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"card-meta\">\n                    <div>@casino.Address</div>\n                    <div>Licenca: <span class=\"mono\">@casino.LicenseNumber</span></div>\n                    <div>Osnovano: @casino.FoundedDate.ToString(\"MMM yyyy\")</div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"card-footer-bar\">\n                    @casino.Tables.Count stolova · @casino.Employees.Count djelatnika\n                </div>\n            </a>\n            <div class=\"card-actions\">\n                <a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/kasina/@casino.Id/uredi\">Uredi</a>\n                <form method=\"post\" action=\"/kasina/@casino.Id/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm('Jesi li siguran da želiš obrisati ovaj casino?')\">\n                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n                    <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>\n                </form>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    }\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n<script>\n$(function () {\n    var debounceTimer;\n    var $grid = $('#entityGrid');\n\n    function renderCasinos(casinos) {\n        if (!casinos || casinos.length === 0) {\n            $grid.html('<p class=\"empty-state\">Nema rezultata.</p>');\n            return;\n        }\n        var html = '';\n        $.each(casinos, function (i, c) {\n            html += '<div class=\"entity-card-wrap\">' +\n                '<a class=\"entity-card\" href=\"/kasina/' + c.id + '\">' +\n                '<div class=\"card-header\"><span class=\"card-title\">' + c.name + '</span></div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-meta\">' +\n                '<div>' + (c.address || '') + '</div>' +\n                '<div>Licenca: <span class=\"mono\">' + (c.licenseNumber || '') + '</span></div>' +\n                '</div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-footer-bar\">' + (c.tableCount || 0) + ' stolova · ' + (c.employeeCount || 0) + ' djelatnika</div>' +\n                '</a>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-actions\">' +\n                '<a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/kasina/' + c.id + '/uredi\">Uredi</a>' +\n                '<form method=\"post\" action=\"/kasina/' + c.id + '/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm(\\'Jesi li siguran?\\')\">' +\n                '<input name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\" type=\"hidden\" value=\"' + $('input[name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\"]').first().val() + '\" />' +\n                '<button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>' +\n                '</form></div></div>';\n        });\n        $grid.html(html);\n    }\n\n    $('#searchInput').on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        if (!q) { location.reload(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n            $.getJSON('/kasina/pretraga', { q: q }, function (data) { renderCasinos(data); });\n        }, 300);\n    });\n});\n</script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PmkQ3i2hYt7vdsfPsjErNe"}

{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"aca2d7e559e73317e","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Game/Index.cshtml","content":"@* Lists all game types as cards with type badge, description, bet range, search, and CRUD actions. *@\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Game>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Games\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Games</span>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"index-action-bar\">\n    <h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Games</h1>\n    <a class=\"btn btn-primary\" href=\"/igre/nova\">Dodaj novu igru</a>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"search-bar\">\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" class=\"form-input\" placeholder=\"Pretraga igara...\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"entity-grid\" id=\"entityGrid\">\n    @foreach (var game in Model)\n    {\n        <div class=\"entity-card-wrap\">\n            <a class=\"entity-card\" href=\"/igre/@game.Id\">\n                <div class=\"card-header\">\n                    <span class=\"card-title\">@game.Name</span>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"card-meta\">\n                    <div><span class=\"badge badge-purple\">@game.Type</span></div>\n                    <div>@game.Description</div>\n                    <div>Bet range: <span class=\"mono\">@game.MinBet–@game.MaxBet</span></div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"card-footer-bar\">\n                    @game.Tables.Count stolova\n                </div>\n            </a>\n            <div class=\"card-actions\">\n                <a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/igre/@game.Id/uredi\">Uredi</a>\n                <form method=\"post\" action=\"/igre/@game.Id/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm('Jesi li siguran da želiš obrisati ovu igru?')\">\n                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n                    <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>\n                </form>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    }\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n<script>\n$(function () {\n    var debounceTimer;\n    var $grid = $('#entityGrid');\n\n    function renderGames(games) {\n        if (!games || games.length === 0) {\n            $grid.html('<p class=\"empty-state\">Nema rezultata.</p>');\n            return;\n        }\n        var html = '';\n        $.each(games, function (i, g) {\n            html += '<div class=\"entity-card-wrap\">' +\n                '<a class=\"entity-card\" href=\"/igre/' + g.id + '\">' +\n                '<div class=\"card-header\"><span class=\"card-title\">' + g.name + '</span></div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-meta\">' +\n                '<div><span class=\"badge badge-purple\">' + (g.type || '') + '</span></div>' +\n                '<div>' + (g.description || '') + '</div>' +\n                '<div>Bet range: <span class=\"mono\">' + (g.minBet || 0) + '–' + (g.maxBet || 0) + '</span></div>' +\n                '</div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-footer-bar\">' + (g.tableCount || 0) + ' stolova</div>' +\n                '</a>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-actions\">' +\n                '<a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/igre/' + g.id + '/uredi\">Uredi</a>' +\n                '<form method=\"post\" action=\"/igre/' + g.id + '/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm(\\'Jesi li siguran?\\')\">' +\n                '<input name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\" type=\"hidden\" value=\"' + $('input[name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\"]').first().val() + '\" />' +\n                '<button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>' +\n                '</form></div></div>';\n        });\n        $grid.html(html);\n    }\n\n    $('#searchInput').on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        if (!q) { location.reload(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n            $.getJSON('/igre/pretraga', { q: q }, function (data) { renderGames(data); });\n        }, 300);\n    });\n});\n</script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0184YbbNckBesetkYtbnQy38"}
{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"aca2d7e559e73317e","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Game/Create.cshtml","content":"@* Create form for a new Game. *@\n@model aspnet.Models.Game\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Nova igra\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <a href=\"/igre\">Games</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Nova igra</span>\n</div>\n\n<h1 class=\"page-title\">Nova igra</h1>\n\n<div class=\"edit-form-wrap\">\n    <form method=\"post\" action=\"/igre/nova\" novalidate>\n        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n\n        <div class=\"form-field\">\n            <label asp-for=\"Name\" class=\"form-label\">Naziv</label>\n            <input asp-for=\"Name\" class=\"form-input\" />\n            <span asp-validation-for=\"Name\" class=\"form-validation\"></span>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-field\">\n            <label asp-for=\"Type\" class=\"form-label\">Vrsta igre</label>\n            <select asp-for=\"Type\" class=\"form-select\">\n                <option value=\"\">-- Odaberi vrstu --</option>\n                @foreach (var val in Enum.GetValues(typeof(aspnet.Models.GameType)))\n                {\n                    <option value=\"@val\">@val</option>\n                }\n            </select>\n            <span asp-validation-for=\"Type\" class=\"form-validation\"></span>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-field\">\n            <label asp-for=\"MinBet\" class=\"form-label\">Minimalni ulog</label>\n Lists all tables across all casinos with game name, bet range, availability badge, search, and CRUD actions. *@\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Table>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Tables\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Tables</span>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"index-action-bar\">\n    <h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Tables</h1>\n    <a class=\"btn btn-primary\" href=\"/stolovi/novi\">Dodaj novi stol</a>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"search-bar\">\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" class=\"form-input\" placeholder=\"Pretraga stolova...\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"entity-grid\" id=\"entityGrid\">\n    @foreach (var table in Model)\n    {\n        <div class=\"entity-card-wrap\">\n            <a class=\"entity-card\" href=\"/stolovi/@table.Id\">\n                <div class=\"card-header\">\n                    <span class=\"card-title\">Stol #@table.TableNumber — @table.Game.Name</span>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"card-meta\">\n                    <div>@table.Casino.Name</div>\n                    <div>Bet range: <span class=\"mono\">@table.MinBet–@table.MaxBet</span></div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"card-footer-bar\">\n                    @if (table.IsAvailable)\n                    {\n                        <span class=\"badge badge-available\">Slobodan</span>\n                    }\n                    else\n                    {\n                        <span class=\"badge badge-unavailable\">Zauzet</span>\n                    }\n                </div>\n            </a>\n            <div class=\"card-actions\">\n                <a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/stolovi/@table.Id/uredi\">Uredi</a>\n                <form method=\"post\" action=\"/stolovi/@table.Id/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm('Jesi li siguran da želiš obrisati ovaj stol?')\">\n                    @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n                    <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>\n                </form>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    }\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n<script>\n$(function () {\n    var debounceTimer;\n    var $grid = $('#entityGrid');\n\n    function renderTables(tables) {\n        if (!tables || tables.length === 0) {\n            $grid.html('<p class=\"empty-state\">Nema rezultata.</p>');\n            return;\n        }\n        var html = '';\n        $.each(tables, function (i, t) {\n            var badge = t.isAvailable\n                ? '<span class=\"badge badge-available\">Slobodan</span>'\n                : '<span class=\"badge badge-unavailable\">Zauzet</span>';\n            html += '<div class=\"entity-card-wrap\">' +\n                '<a class=\"entity-card\" href=\"/stolovi/' + t.id + '\">' +\n                '<div class=\"card-header\"><span class=\"card-title\">Stol #' + t.tableNumber + ' — ' + (t.gameName || '') + '</span></div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-meta\">' +\n                '<div>' + (t.casinoName || '') + '</div>' +\n                '<div>Bet range: <span class=\"mono\">' + (t.minBet || 0) + '–' + (t.maxBet || 0) + '</span></div>' +\n                '</div>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-footer-bar\">' + badge + '</div>' +\n                '</a>' +\n                '<div class=\"card-actions\">' +\n                '<a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/stolovi/' + t.id + '/uredi\">Uredi</a>' +\n                '<form method=\"post\" action=\"/stolovi/' + t.id + '/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm(\\'Jesi li siguran?\\')\">' +\n                '<input name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\" type=\"hidden\" value=\"' + $('input[name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\"]').first().val() + '\" />' +\n                '<button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>' +\n                '</form></div></div>';\n        });\n        $grid.html(html);\n    }\n\n    $('#searchInput').on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        if (!q) { location.reload(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n            $.getJSON('/stolovi/pretraga', { q: q }, function (data) { renderTables(data); });\n        }, 300);\n    });\n});\n</script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VUTWfNiQ38eMBbYc4yua6p"}

{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"aca2d7e559e73317e","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Employee/Index.cshtml","content":"@* Lists all employees in a table with name, position, casino link, search, and CRUD actions. *@\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Employee>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Employees\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Employees</span>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"index-action-bar\">\n    <h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Employees</h1>\n    <a class=\"btn btn-primary\" href=\"/djelatnici/novi\">Dodaj novog djelatnika</a>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"search-bar\">\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" class=\"form-input\" placeholder=\"Pretraga djelatnika...\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"panel\">\n    <table class=\"data-table\" id=\"employeeTable\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th>#ID</th>\n                <th>Ime i prezime</th>\n                <th>Pozicija</th>\n                <th>Casino</th>\n                <th>Akcije</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody id=\"employeeBody\">\n            @foreach (var employee in Model)\n            {\n                <tr>\n                    <td><span class=\"mono\">@employee.Id</span></td>\n                    <td>@employee.FirstName @employee.LastName</td>\n                    <td><span class=\"badge badge-purple\">@employee.Position</span></td>\n                    <td>\n                        <a href=\"/kasina/@employee.Casino.Id\" style=\"color:var(--purple-hi);text-decoration:none;\">@employee.Casino.Name</a>\n                    </td>\n                    <td style=\"white-space:nowrap;\">\n                        <a class=\"btn btn-sm\" href=\"/djelatnici/@employee.Id\">Detalji</a>\n                        <a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/djelatnici/@employee.Id/uredi\">Uredi</a>\n                        <form method=\"post\" action=\"/djelatnici/@employee.Id/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm('Jesi li siguran da želiš obrisati ovog djelatnika?')\">\n                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n                            <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>\n                        </form>\n                    </td>\n                </tr>\n            }\n        </tbody>\n    </table>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n<script>\n$(function () {\n    var debounceTimer;\n    var $body = $('#employeeBody');\n    var antiForgeryToken = $('input[name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\"]').first().val();\n\n    function renderEmployees(employees) {\n        if (!employees || employees.length === 0) {\n            $body.html('<tr><td colspan=\"5\" class=\"empty-state\" style=\"padding:1rem;\">Nema rezultata.</td></tr>');\n            return;\n        }\n        var html = '';\n        $.each(employees, function (i, e) {\n            html += '<tr>' +\n                '<td><span class=\"mono\">' + e.id + '</span></td>' +\n                '<td>' + e.firstName + ' ' + e.lastName + '</td>' +\n                '<td><span class=\"badge badge-purple\">' + (e.position || '') + '</span></td>' +\n                '<td><a href=\"/kasina/' + (e.casinoId || '') + '\" style=\"color:var(--purple-hi);text-decoration:none;\">' + (e.casinoName || '') + '</a></td>' +\n                '<td style=\"white-space:nowrap;\">' +\n                '<a class=\"btn btn-sm\" href=\"/djelatnici/' + e.id + '\">Detalji</a> ' +\n                '<a class=\"btn btn-sm btn-accent\" href=\"/djelatnici/' + e.id + '/uredi\">Uredi</a> ' +\n                '<form method=\"post\" action=\"/djelatnici/' + e.id + '/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm(\\'Jesi li siguran?\\')\">' +\n                '<input name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\" type=\"hidden\" value=\"' + antiForgeryToken + '\" />' +\n                '<button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>' +\n                '</form></td></tr>';\n        });\n        $body.html(html);\n    }\n\n    $('#searchInput').on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        if (!q) { location.reload(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n            $.getJSON('/djelatnici/pretraga', { q: q }, function (data) { renderEmployees(data); });\n        }, 300);\n    });\n});\n</script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_012JDe3HGexJppRTUorfXsha"}

Model.Casino.Name : \"\" },\n            { \"CurrentId\", Model.CasinoId.ToString() }\n        })\n\n        <div class=\"form-actions\">\n            <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-primary\">Spremi</button>\n            <a class=\"btn btn-back\" href=\"/djelatnici/@Model.Id\">Odustani</a>\n        </div>\n    </form>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <partial name=\"_ValidationScriptsPartial\" />\n    <script>\n        $(function () {\n            $('form').validate({ onfocusout: function (el) { this.element(el); } });\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JUpKyV4Dxa8ZDyQtaGxUt8"}

{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"aca2d7e559e73317e","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Reservation/Index.cshtml","content":"@* Lists all reservations in a table with player, casino, game, table number, timestamp, search, and CRUD actions. *@\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Reservation>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Reservations\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Reservations</span>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"index-action-bar\">\n    <h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Reservations</h1>\n    <a class=\"btn btn-primary\" href=\"/rezervacije/nova\">Nova rezervacija</a>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"search-bar\">\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" class=\"form-input\" placeholder=\"Pretraga rezervacija...\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"panel\">\n    <table class=\"data-table\">\n        <thead>\n            <tr>\n                <th>#ID</th>\n                <th>Igrač</th>\n                <th>Casino</th>\n                <th>Igra</th>\n                <th>Stol #</th>\n                <th>Datum</th>\n                <th>Akcije</th>\n            </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody id=\"reservationBody\">\n            @foreach (var reservation in Model)\n            {\n                <tr>\n                    <td><span class=\"mono\">@reservation.Id</span></td>\n                    <td>\n                        <a href=\"/igraci/@reservation.Player.Id\" style=\"color:var(--purple-hi);text-decoration:none;\">\n                            @reservation.Player.FirstName @reservation.Player.LastName\n                        </a>\n                    </td>\n                    <td>@reservation.Table.Casino.Name</td>\n                    <td>@reservation.Table.Game.Name</td>\n                    <td><span class=\"mono\">@reservation.Table.TableNumber</span></td>\n                    <td><span class=\"mono\">@reservation.ReservedAt.ToString(\"dd MMM yyyy HH:mm\")</span></td>\n                    <td style=\"white-space:nowrap;\">\n                        <a class=\"btn btn-sm\" href=\"/rezervacije/@reservation.Id\">Detalji</a>\n                        <form method=\"post\" action=\"/rezervacije/@reservation.Id/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm('Jesi li siguran da želiš obrisati ovu rezervaciju?')\">\n                            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n                            <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>\n                        </form>\n                    </td>\n                </tr>\n            }\n        </tbody>\n    </table>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n<script>\n$(function () {\n    var debounceTimer;\n    var $body = $('#reservationBody');\n    var antiForgeryToken = $('input[name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\"]').first().val();\n\n    function renderReservations(reservations) {\n        if (!reservations || reservations.length === 0) {\n            $body.html('<tr><td colspan=\"7\" class=\"empty-state\" style=\"padding:1rem;\">Nema rezultata.</td></tr>');\n            return;\n        }\n        var html = '';\n        $.each(reservations, function (i, r) {\n            html += '<tr>' +\n                '<td><span class=\"mono\">' + r.id + '</span></td>' +\n                '<td><a href=\"/igraci/' + (r.playerId || '') + '\" style=\"color:var(--purple-hi);text-decoration:none;\">' + (r.playerName || '') + '</a></td>' +\n                '<td>' + (r.casinoName || '') + '</td>' +\n                '<td>' + (r.gameName || '') + '</td>' +\n                '<td><span class=\"mono\">' + (r.tableNumber || '') + '</span></td>' +\n                '<td><span class=\"mono\">' + (r.reservedAt || '') + '</span></td>' +\n                '<td style=\"white-space:nowrap;\">' +\n                '<a class=\"btn btn-sm\" href=\"/rezervacije/' + r.id + '\">Detalji</a> ' +\n                '<form method=\"post\" action=\"/rezervacije/' + r.id + '/obrisi\" class=\"d-inline\" onsubmit=\"return confirm(\\'Jesi li siguran?\\')\">' +\n                '<input name=\"__RequestVerificationToken\" type=\"hidden\" value=\"' + antiForgeryToken + '\" />' +\n                '<button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-sm\" style=\"border-color:rgba(255,90,127,0.5);color:var(--danger)\">Obriši</button>' +\n                '</form></td></tr>';\n        });\n        $body.html(html);\n    }\n\n    $('#searchInput').on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        if (!q) { location.reload(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n            $.getJSON('/rezervacije/pretraga', { q: q }, function (data) { renderReservations(data); });\n        }, 300);\n    });\n});\n</script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BKWQbGpaoqcg3DnT57bxqX"}
{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"aca2d7e559e73317e","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Reservation/Create.cshtml","content":"@* Create form for a new Reservation. Uses autocomplete for Player and Table selection. *@\n@model aspnet.Models.Reservation\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Nova rezervacija\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <a href=\"/rezervacije\">Reservations</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Nova rezervacija</span>\n</div>\n\n<h1 class=\"page-title\">Nova rezervacija</h1>\n\n<div class=\"edit-form-wrap\">\n    <form method=\"post\" action=\"/rezervacije/nova\" novalidate>\n        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n\n        <div class=\"form-field\">\n            <label asp-for=\"ReservedAt\" class=\"form-label\">Datum i vrijeme</label>\n            <input asp-for=\"ReservedAt\" class=\"form-input\" type=\"datetime-local\" />\n            <span asp-validation-for=\"ReservedAt\" class=\"form-validation\"></span>\n        </div>\n\n        @await Html.PartialAsync(\"_Autocomplete\", (object)null, new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData) {\n            { \"FieldId\", \"PlayerId\" },\n            { \"FieldLabel\", \"Igrač\" },\n            { \"EndpointUrl\", \"/igraci/autocomplete\" },\n            { \"CurrentText\", \"\" },\n            { \"CurrentId\", \"\" }\n        })\n\n        @await Html.PartialAsync(\"_Autocomplete\",         { \"CurrentText\", \"\" },\n            { \"CurrentId\", \"\" }\n        })\n\n        <div class=\"form-actions\">\n            <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn Type badges: green for Deposit/Win, red for Withdrawal/Bet. Includes search. *@\n@model List<aspnet.Models.Transaction>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Transakcije\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"breadcrumb-bar\">\n    <a asp-controller=\"Home\" asp-action=\"Index\">Home</a>\n    <span class=\"breadcrumb-sep\">›</span>\n    <span class=\"current\">Transakcije</span>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"index-action-bar\">\n    <h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Sve transakcije</h1>\n    <a class=\"btn btn-primary\" href=\"/transakcije/nova\">Nova transakcija</a>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"search-bar\">\n    <input type=\"text\" id=\"searchInput\" class=\"form-input\" placeholder=\"Pretraga transakcija...\" autocomplete=\"off\" />\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"panel\">\n    @if (!Model.Any())\n    {\n        <p class=\"empty-state\">Nema transakcija.</p>\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        <table class=\"data-table\">\n            <thead>\n                <tr>\n                    <th>Igrač</th>\n                    <th>Vrsta</th>\n                    <th>Iznos</th>\n                    <th>Datum</th>\n                </tr>\n            </thead>\n            <tbody id=\"txBody\">\n                @foreach (var tx in Model)\n                {\n                    <tr>\n                        <td>\n                            <a href=\"/igraci/@tx.PlayerId\"\n                               style=\"color: var(--purple-hi); text-decoration: none;\">\n                                @tx.Player.FirstName @tx.Player.LastName\n                            </a>\n                        </td>\n                        <td>\n                            @if (tx.Type == aspnet.Models.TransactionType.Deposit)\n                            {\n                                <span class=\"badge badge-available\">Uplata</span>\n                            }\n                            else if (tx.Type == aspnet.Models.TransactionType.Win)\n                            {\n                                <span class=\"badge badge-available\">Dobitak</span>\n                            }\n                            else if (tx.Type == aspnet.Models.TransactionType.Withdrawal)\n                            {\n                                <span class=\"badge badge-tx-danger\">Isplata</span>\n                            }\n                            else\n                            {\n                                <span class=\"badge badge-tx-danger\">Ulog</span>\n                            }\n                        </td>\n                        <td><span class=\"mono\">@tx.Amount.ToString(\"C\")</span></td>\n                        <td><span class=\"mono\">@tx.CreatedAt.ToString(\"dd MMM yyyy HH:mm\")</span></td>\n                    </tr>\n                }\n            </tbody>\n        </table>\n    }\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n<script>\n$(function () {\n    var debounceTimer;\n    var $body = $('#txBody');\n\n    function txBadge(type) {\n        if (type === 'Deposit' || type === 0)   return '<span class=\"badge badge-available\">Uplata</span>';\n        if (type === 'Win'     || type === 3)   return '<span class=\"badge badge-available\">Dobitak</span>';\n        if (type === 'Withdrawal' || type === 1) return '<span class=\"badge badge-tx-danger\">Isplata</span>';\n        return '<span class=\"badge badge-tx-danger\">Ulog</span>';\n    }\n\n    function renderTransactions(txs) {\n        if (!txs || txs.length === 0) {\n            $body.html('<tr><td colspan=\"4\" class=\"empty-state\" style=\"padding:1rem;\">Nema rezultata.</td></tr>');\n            return;\n        }\n        var html = '';\n        $.each(txs, function (i, t) {\n            html += '<tr>' +\n                '<td><a href=\"/igraci/' + (t.playerId || '') + '\" style=\"color:var(--purple-hi);text-decoration:none;\">' + (t.playerName || '') + '</a></td>' +\n                '<td>' + txBadge(t.type) + '</td>' +\n                '<td><span class=\"mono\">' + (t.amount || '') + '</span></td>' +\n                '<td><span class=\"mono\">' + (t.createdAt || '') + '</span></td>' +\n                '</tr>';\n        });\n        $body.html(html);\n    }\n\n    $('#searchInput').on('input', function () {\n        clearTimeout(debounceTimer);\n        var q = $(this).val().trim();\n        if (!q) { location.reload(); return; }\n        debounceTimer = setTimeout(function () {\n            $.getJSON('/transakcije/pretraga', { q: q }, function (data) { renderTransactions(data); });\n        }, 300);\n    });\n});\n</script>\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VtKRh8iwWzxzNJKJLoGmNn"}
