{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"description":"Custom date/time picker: partial view + CasinoPicker JS class + CSS + apply to all 6 forms","prompt":"You need to build a custom date/time picker widget for an ASP.NET MVC Casino app. The browser's native `<input type=\"date\">` / `<input type=\"datetime-local\">` must NOT be used — the picker must be a fully JS-built calendar. No third-party libraries. jQuery is already on the page.\n\n---\n\n## Files to create/modify\n\n1. `Views/Shared/_DatePicker.cshtml` — NEW partial view\n2. `wwwroot/js/site.js` — ADD the `CasinoPicker` class (currently empty)\n3. `wwwroot/css/casino.css` — ADD datepicker styles (append to end)\n4. `Views/Player/Create.cshtml` — replace native date input with `_DatePicker` partial\n5. `Views/Player/Edit.cshtml` — same\n6. `Views/Casino/Create.cshtml` — same\n7. `Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml` — same\n8. `Views/Reservation/Create.cshtml` — same (datetime mode)\n9. `Views/Transaction/Create.cshtml` — same (datetime mode)\n\nAll files live under `/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/`.\n\n---\n\n## 1. `_DatePicker.cshtml` partial\n\nParameters via ViewData:\n- `FieldId` — string — the model property name (used as input `name`/`id`), e.g. `\"DateOfBirth\"`\n- `FieldLabel` — string — the visible label\n- `Mode` — string — `\"date\"` or `\"datetime\"`\n- `CurrentValue` — object (may be DateTime or null/absent)\n\nThe partial must render:\n```html\n<div class=\"form-field\">\n    <label class=\"form-label\" for=\"{fieldId}_display\">{fieldLabel}</label>\n    <div class=\"datepicker-wrap\" id=\"{fieldId}_wrap\">\n        <!-- hidden: this is what gets POST-ed to the server -->\n        <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"{fieldId}\" id=\"{fieldId}\"\n               value=\"{currentIso}\"\n               data-val=\"true\"\n               data-val-required=\"{fieldLabel} je obavezan/a\" />\n        <!-- display: readonly, shows formatted date to user -->\n        <input type=\"text\" id=\"{fieldId}_display\"\n               class=\"form-input datepicker-display\"\n               placeholder=\"{hr: dd.MM.yyyy [HH:mm] / en: MM/dd/yyyy [HH:mm]}\"\n               readonly autocomplete=\"off\" />\n        <!-- calendar popup -->\n        <div class=\"datepicker-popup\" id=\"{fieldId}_cal\" style=\"display:none\"></div>\n    </div>\n    <!-- server-side ModelState errors + client-side jQuery validate messages -->\n    @Html.ValidationMessage(fieldId, null, new { @class = \"form-validation\" })\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n<script>\n$(function() {\n    new CasinoPicker({\n        fieldId:    '@fieldId',\n        mode:       '@mode',\n        currentIso: '@currentIso'\n    });\n    // Make jQuery Validate check hidden inputs with data-val-required\n    $.validator.setDefaults({ ignore: ':hidden:not([data-val-required])' });\n});\n</script>\n}\n```\n\nRazor logic at top of partial:\n```csharp\n@{\n    var fieldId    = (string)(ViewData[\"FieldId\"]    ?? \"\");\n    var fieldLabel = (string)(ViewData[\"FieldLabel\"] ?? \"\");\n    var mode       = (string)(ViewData[\"Mode\"]       ?? \"date\");  // \"date\" or \"datetime\"\n    var raw        = ViewData[\"CurrentValue\"];\n    var currentIso = \"\";\n    if (raw is DateTime dt && dt > DateTime.MinValue) {\n        currentIso = mode == \"datetime\"\n            ? dt.ToString(\"yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm\")\n            : dt.ToString(\"yyyy-MM-dd\");\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 2. `CasinoPicker` JS class — goes in `wwwroot/js/site.js`\n\nFull implementation of the class:\n\n```js\nclass CasinoPicker {\n    constructor(opts) {\n        this.fieldId   = opts.fieldId;\n        this.mode      = opts.mode || 'date';\n        this.isHr      = (navigator.language || 'en').startsWith('hr');\n\n        this.$hidden  = $('#' + this.fieldId);\n        this.$display = $('#' + this.fieldId + '_display');\n        this.$popup   = $('#' + this.fieldId + '_cal');\n\n        // calendar view state\n        var now = new Date();\n        this.viewYear  = now.getFullYear();\n        this.viewMonth = now.getMonth();\n        this.selYear   = null;\n        this.selMonth  = null;\n        this.selDay    = null;\n        this.selHour   = 12;\n        this.selMin    = 0;\n\n        // pre-fill if editing\n        if (opts.currentIso) {\n            var d = new Date(opts.currentIso);\n            if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) {\n                this.viewYear  = d.getFullYear();\n                this.viewMonth = d.getMonth();\n                this.selYear   = d.getFullYear();\n                this.selMonth  = d.getMonth();\n                this.selDay    = d.getDate();\n                this.selHour   = d.getHours();\n                this.selMin    = d.getMinutes();\n                this.$display.val(this._fmt(d));\n            }\n        }\n\n        this._bind();\n    }\n\n    // ── Format for display ────────────────────────────────────────\n    _fmt(d) {\n        var dd   = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');\n        var mm   = String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');\n        var yyyy = d.getFullYear();\n        var HH   = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');\n        var mn   = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');\n        if (this.isHr) {\n            return this.mode === 'datetime'\n                ? dd+'.'+mm+'.'+yyyy+' '+HH+':'+mn\n                : dd+'.'+mm+'.'+yyyy;\n        }\n        return this.mode === 'datetime'\n            ? mm+'/'+dd+'/'+yyyy+' '+HH+':'+mn\n            : mm+'/'+dd+'/'+yyyy;\n    }\n\n    // ── ISO for hidden input ──────────────────────────────────────\n    _iso(d) {\n        var yyyy = d.getFullYear();\n        var mm   = String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');\n        var dd   = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');\n        if (this.mode === 'datetime') {\n            var HH = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');\n            var mn = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');\n            return yyyy+'-'+mm+'-'+dd+'T'+HH+':'+mn;\n        }\n        return yyyy+'-'+mm+'-'+dd;\n    }\n\n    // ── Render calendar HTML ──────────────────────────────────────\n    _render() {\n        var MO_HR = ['Siječanj','Veljača','Ožujak','Travanj','Svibanj','Lipanj',\n                     'Srpanj','Kolovoz','Rujan','Listopad','Studeni','Prosinac'];\n        var MO_EN = ['January','February','March','April','May','June',\n                     'July','August','September','October','November','December'];\n        var DN_HR = ['Pon','Uto','Sri','Čet','Pet','Sub','Ned'];\n        var DN_EN = ['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'];\n\n        var months = this.isHr ? MO_HR : MO_EN;\n        var days   = this.isHr ? DN_HR : DN_EN;\n        var y = this.viewYear, m = this.viewMonth;\n\n        // first weekday of month, Mon=0\n        var fd = (new Date(y, m, 1).getDay() + 6) % 7;\n        var dim = new Date(y, m+1, 0).getDate();\n\n        var today = new Date();\n        var tY = today.getFullYear(), tM = today.getMonth(), tD = today.getDate();\n\n        var h = '<div class=\"dp-header\">'\n              + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-nav dp-prev\">&#8249;</button>'\n              + '<span class=\"dp-title\">' + months[m] + ' ' + y + '</span>'\n              + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-nav dp-next\">&#8250;</button>'\n              + '</div><div class=\"dp-grid\">';\n\n        days.forEach(function(d) { h += '<div class=\"dp-day-head\">'+d+'</div>'; });\n\n        for (var i=0; i<fd; i++) h += '<div class=\"dp-cell\"></div>';\n\n        for (var d=1; d<=dim; d++) {\n            var cls = 'dp-cell dp-day';\n            if (d===tD && m===tM && y===tY)           cls += ' dp-today';\n            if (d===this.selDay && m===this.selMonth && y===this.selYear) cls += ' dp-selected';\n            h += '<div class=\"'+cls+'\" data-d=\"'+d+'\">'+d+'</div>';\n        }\n        h += '</div>';\n\n        if (this.mode === 'datetime') {\n            h += '<div class=\"dp-time\">'\n               + '<span class=\"dp-time-label\">'+(this.isHr?'Vrijeme:':'Time:')+'</span>'\n               + '<input type=\"number\" class=\"dp-time-input dp-hour\" min=\"0\" max=\"23\" value=\"'\n               +    String(this.selHour).padStart(2,'0')+'\" />'\n               + '<span class=\"dp-time-sep\">:</span>'\n               + '<input type=\"number\" class=\"dp-time-input dp-min\" min=\"0\" max=\"59\" value=\"'\n               +    String(this.selMin).padStart(2,'0')+'\" />'\n               + '</div>';\n        }\n\n        h += '<div class=\"dp-footer\">'\n           + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-clear\">'+(this.isHr?'Očisti':'Clear')+'</button>'\n           + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-ok btn btn-sm btn-primary\">'+(this.isHr?'Potvrdi':'OK')+'</button>'\n           + '</div>';\n\n        return h;\n    }\n\n    // ── Open / close popup ────────────────────────────────────────\n    _open() {\n        this.$popup.html(this._render()).show();\n        this._bindCal();\n    }\n    _close() { this.$popup.hide(); }\n\n    // ── Commit current selection ──────────────────────────────────\n    _commit() {\n        if (this.selDay === null) return;\n        var H = this.mode === 'datetime'\n            ? parseInt(this.$popup.find('.dp-hour').val()) || 0 : 0;\n        var M = this.mode === 'datetime'\n            ? parseInt(this.$popup.find('.dp-min').val())  || 0 : 0;\n        this.selHour = H; this.selMin = M;\n        var d = new Date(this.selYear, this.selMonth, this.selDay, H, M);\n        this.$display.val(this._fmt(d));\n        this.$hidden.val(this._iso(d));\n        // clear any validation message\n        this.$hidden.valid && this.$hidden.valid();\n    }\n\n    // ── Bind outer events ─────────────────────────────────────────\n    _bind() {\n        var self = this;\n\n        this.$display.on('click', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n            if (self.$popup.is(':visible')) self._close();\n            else self._open();\n        });\n\n        // validate on blur\n        this.$display.on('blur', function() {\n            setTimeout(function() {\n                if (!self.$popup.is(':visible') && !self.$hidden.val()) {\n                    // trigger jQuery validate on the hidden field\n                    if ($.fn.validate) {\n                        self.$hidden.closest('form').validate().element(self.$hidden[0]);\n                    }\n                }\n            }, 200);\n        });\n\n        $(document).on('click.dp_' + this.fieldId, function() { self._close(); });\n        this.$popup.on('click', function(e) { e.stopPropagation(); });\n    }\n\n    // ── Bind calendar events (re-run after each re-render) ────────\n    _bindCal() {\n        var self = this;\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-prev').on('click', function() {\n            if (--self.viewMonth < 0) { self.viewMonth = 11; self.viewYear--; }\n            self.$popup.html(self._render()); self._bindCal();\n        });\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-next').on('click', function() {\n            if (++self.viewMonth > 11) { self.viewMonth = 0; self.viewYear++; }\n            self.$popup.html(self._render()); self._bindCal();\n        });\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-day').on('click', function() {\n            self.selDay   = parseInt($(this).data('d'));\n            self.selYear  = self.viewYear;\n            self.selMonth = self.viewMonth;\n            if (self.mode === 'datetime') {\n                // re-render to highlight + preserve time inputs\n                self.selHour = parseInt(self.$popup.find('.dp-hour').val()) || self.selHour;\n                self.selMin  = parseInt(self.$popup.find('.dp-min').val())  || self.selMin;\n            }\n            self.$popup.html(self._render()); self._bindCal();\n            if (self.mode === 'date') { self._commit(); self._close(); }\n        });\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-ok').on('click', function() {\n            self._commit(); self._close();\n        });\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-clear').on('click', function() {\n            self.selDay = self.selYear = self.selMonth = null;\n            self.$display.val(''); self.$hidden.val('');\n            self._close();\n        });\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. CSS to append to `wwwroot/css/casino.css`\n\n```css\n/* ── Custom date picker ─────────────────────────────────────── */\n.datepicker-wrap { position: relative; }\n\n.datepicker-display { cursor: pointer; caret-color: transparent; }\n.datepicker-display:focus { border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(139,212,80,0.1); }\n\n.datepicker-popup {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: calc(100% + 6px);\n  left: 0;\n  z-index: 200;\n  width: 280px;\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1230, #261540 35%, #1d1030 100%);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.4);\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.7), 0 0 30px rgba(115,79,154,0.2);\n  padding: 0.75rem;\n  user-select: none;\n}\n\n.dp-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;\n}\n\n.dp-title {\n  font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(139,212,80,0.35);\n}\n\n.dp-nav {\n  background: none;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.3);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  font-size: 1.1rem;\n  line-height: 1;\n  padding: 0.15rem 0.45rem;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: background 120ms, border-color 120ms;\n}\n.dp-nav:hover { background: rgba(139,212,80,0.12); border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.65); }\n\n.dp-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);\n  gap: 2px;\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.dp-day-head {\n  text-align: center;\n  font-size: 0.68rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n  padding: 0.2rem 0;\n}\n\n.dp-cell {\n  text-align: center;\n  font-size: 0.82rem;\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  padding: 0.3rem 0;\n  transition: background 100ms, color 100ms;\n}\n\n.dp-day {\n  cursor: pointer;\n  color: var(--text);\n}\n.dp-day:hover { background: rgba(139,212,80,0.14); color: var(--lime); }\n\n.dp-selected {\n  background: rgba(63,109,78,0.55) !important;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.7);\n  color: var(--lime) !important;\n  font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.dp-today {\n  border: 1px solid rgba(150,95,212,0.65);\n  color: var(--purple-hi);\n}\n\n.dp-time {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem 0;\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.1);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.1);\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n  justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.dp-time-label { color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }\n\n.dp-time-input {\n  width: 46px;\n  text-align: center;\n  background: rgba(10,9,20,0.7);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(139,212,80,0.3);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  color: var(--lime);\n  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;\n  font-size: 0.95rem;\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.3rem;\n  outline: none;\n  -moz-appearance: textfield;\n}\n.dp-time-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button,\n.dp-time-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button { -webkit-appearance: none; }\n.dp-time-input:focus { border-color: rgba(139,212,80,0.65); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(139,212,80,0.1); }\n\n.dp-time-sep { color: var(--lime); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; }\n\n.dp-footer {\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.dp-clear {\n  background: none;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255,90,127,0.4);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  color: var(--danger);\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  padding: 0.28rem 0.6rem;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: background 120ms, border-color 120ms;\n}\n.dp-clear:hover { background: rgba(255,90,127,0.1); border-color: rgba(255,90,127,0.7); }\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. Update 6 form views — replace native date inputs with `_DatePicker` partial\n\n### `Views/Player/Create.cshtml`\nReplace:\n```html\n<div class=\"form-field\">\n    <label asp-for=\"DateOfBirth\" class=\"form-label\">Datum rođenja</label>\n    <input asp-for=\"DateOfBirth\" class=\"form-input\" type=\"date\" />\n    <span asp-validation-for=\"DateOfBirth\" class=\"form-validation\"></span>\n</div>\n```\nWith:\n```razor\n@await Html.PartialAsync(\"_DatePicker\", (object)null, new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData) {\n    { \"FieldId\", \"DateOfBirth\" },\n    { \"FieldLabel\", \"Datum rođenja\" },\n    { \"Mode\", \"date\" },\n    { \"CurrentValue\", Model.DateOfBirth }\n})\n```\n\n### `Views/Player/Edit.cshtml`\nSame replacement (same block with DateOfBirth), same partial call — `Model.DateOfBirth` holds the existing value.\n\n### `Views/Casino/Create.cshtml`\nReplace:\n```html\n<div class=\"form-field\">\n    <label asp-for=\"FoundedDate\" class=\"form-label\">Datum osnivanja</label>\n    <input asp-for=\"FoundedDate\" class=\"form-input\" type=\"date\" />\n    <span asp-validation-for=\"FoundedDate\" class=\"form-validation\"></span>\n</div>\n```\nWith:\n```razor\n@await Html.PartialAsync(\"_DatePicker\", (object)null, new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData) {\n    { \"FieldId\", \"FoundedDate\" },\n    { \"FieldLabel\", \"Datum osnivanja\" },\n    { \"Mode\", \"date\" },\n    { \"CurrentValue\", Model.FoundedDate }\n})\n```\n\n### `Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml`\nSame replacement.\n\n### `Views/Reservation/Create.cshtml`\nReplace:\n```html\n<div class=\"form-field\">\n    <label asp-for=\"ReservedAt\" class=\"form-label\">Datum i vrijeme</label>\n    <input asp-for=\"ReservedAt\" class=\"form-input\" type=\"datetime-local\" />\n    <span asp-validation-for=\"ReservedAt\" class=\"form-validation\"></span>\n</div>\n```\nWith:\n```razor\n@await Html.PartialAsync(\"_DatePicker\", (object)null, new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData) {\n    { \"FieldId\", \"ReservedAt\" },\n    { \"FieldLabel\", \"Datum i vrijeme\" },\n    { \"Mode\", \"datetime\" },\n    { \"CurrentValue\", Model.ReservedAt }\n})\n```\n\n### `Views/Transaction/Create.cshtml`\nReplace:\n```html\n<div class=\"form-field\">\n    <label asp-for=\"CreatedAt\" class=\"form-label\">Datum i vrijeme</label>\n    <input asp-for=\"CreatedAt\" class=\"form-input\" type=\"datetime-local\" />\n    <span asp-validation-for=\"CreatedAt\" class=\"form-validation\"></span>\n</div>\n```\nWith:\n```razor\n@await Html.PartialAsync(\"_DatePicker\", (object)null, new ViewDataDictionary(ViewData) {\n    { \"FieldId\", \"CreatedAt\" },\n    { \"FieldLabel\", \"Datum i vrijeme\" },\n    { \"Mode\", \"datetime\" },\n    { \"CurrentValue\", Model.CreatedAt }\n})\n```\n\n---\n\n## Key requirements checklist\n1. No `<input type=\"date\">` or `<input type=\"datetime-local\">` anywhere after your changes\n2. `CasinoPicker` class is defined ONCE in `site.js` (not duplicated inline)\n3. The partial instantiates the picker with a small inline `$(function(){ new CasinoPicker({...}); });` in `@section Scripts`\n4. Locale: `navigator.language.startsWith('hr')` → `dd.MM.yyyy` format; else → `MM/dd/yyyy`\n5. `datetime` mode shows time picker (hour + minute) in the popup\n6. `date` mode: clicking a day closes popup and commits immediately\n7. `datetime` mode: must click \"Potvrdi/OK\" to commit (allows time adjustment after day selection)\n8. Clear button empties both display and hidden inputs\n9. Blur on display input → triggers jQuery validate on the hidden field\n10. CSS matches the dark casino theme (lime accents, dark backgrounds, purple hover)\n11. Popup must be positioned absolutely below the display input and not clip outside `.edit-form-wrap` (set `overflow: visible` on `.edit-form-wrap` if needed)\n\n---\n\n## Important: `.edit-form-wrap` overflow fix\n\nThe current `casino.css` does not set `overflow` on `.edit-form-wrap`. The popup is absolutely positioned so it should be fine, but confirm there's no `overflow: hidden` that would clip it. If there is, change it to `overflow: visible` for that class.\n\nAlso, the `_DatePicker.cshtml` partial uses `@section Scripts { ... }`. In ASP.NET Core, sections can only be defined once per view. Since the partial is rendered from within a view that already has `@section Scripts`, using `@section` inside a partial will cause a runtime error. \n\n**Instead**, put the initialization script INLINE in the partial (not inside `@section Scripts`) just after the HTML:\n```html\n<script>\n$(function() {\n    new CasinoPicker({ fieldId: '@fieldId', mode: '@mode', currentIso: '@currentIso' });\n    $.validator.setDefaults({ ignore: ':hidden:not([data-val-required])' });\n});\n</script>\n```\nThis is fine since jQuery is loaded before this script runs (it's in `@section Scripts` in the parent view which loads after jQuery).\n\nActually wait — the partial's inline `<script>` won't be inside `@section Scripts`, so it will render in the middle of the page body if the parent view renders the partial in the form. That's also fine with jQuery since jQuery is loaded in `<body>` before the `@section Scripts` block. The inline script `$(function(){...})` defers until DOM ready so it works regardless of where it renders.\n","subagent_type":"ux-designer"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0181yY8Vfb8oGYJi1bmXaZBy"}

{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"a5d564f190f853d29","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views/Shared/_DatePicker.cshtml","content":"@{\n    var fieldId    = (string)(ViewData[\"FieldId\"]    ?? \"\");\n    var fieldLabel = (string)(ViewData[\"FieldLabel\"] ?? \"\");\n    var mode       = (string)(ViewData[\"Mode\"]       ?? \"date\");\n    var raw        = ViewData[\"CurrentValue\"];\n    var currentIso = \"\";\n    if (raw is DateTime dt && dt > DateTime.MinValue) {\n        currentIso = mode == \"datetime\"\n            ? dt.ToString(\"yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm\")\n            : dt.ToString(\"yyyy-MM-dd\");\n    }\n    var placeholder = mode == \"datetime\" ? \"dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm\" : \"dd.MM.yyyy\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"form-field\">\n    <label class=\"form-label\" for=\"@(fieldId)_display\">@fieldLabel</label>\n    <div class=\"datepicker-wrap\" id=\"@(fieldId)_wrap\">\n        <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"@fieldId\" id=\"@fieldId\"\n               value=\"@currentIso\"\n               data-val=\"true\"\n               data-val-required=\"@fieldLabel je obavezan/a\" />\n        <input type=\"text\" id=\"@(fieldId)_display\"\n               class=\"form-input datepicker-display\"\n               placeholder=\"@placeholder\"\n               readonly autocomplete=\"off\" />\n        <div class=\"datepicker-popup\" id=\"@(fieldId)_cal\" style=\"display:none\"></div>\n    </div>\n    @Html.ValidationMessage(fieldId, null, new { @class = \"form-validation\" })\n</div>\n\n<script>\n$(function() {\n    new CasinoPicker({\n        fieldId:    '@fieldId',\n        mode:       '@mode',\n        currentIso: '@currentIso'\n    });\n    $.validator.setDefaults({ ignore: ':hidden:not([data-val-required])' });\n});\n</script>\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_016iv66HrCRuUd4GbsjSX1Z5"}
{"session_id":"a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/a86beb67-ff34-44ab-9cd5-ad1ae3942581.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"a5d564f190f853d29","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/wwwroot/js/site.js","content":"// Please see documentation at https://learn.microsoft.com/aspnet/core/client-side/bundling-and-minification\n// for details on configuring this project to bundle and minify static web assets.\n\n// Write your JavaScript code.\n\nclass CasinoPicker {\n    constructor(opts) {\n        this.fieldId   = opts.fieldId;\n        this.mode      = opts.mode || 'date';\n        this.isHr      = (navigator.language || 'en').startsWith('hr');\n\n        this.$hidden  = $('#' + this.fieldId);\n        this.$display = $('#' + this.fieldId + '_display');\n        this.$popup   = $('#' + this.fieldId + '_cal');\n\n        // calendar view state\n        var now = new Date();\n        this.viewYear  = now.getFullYear();\n        this.viewMonth = now.getMonth();\n        this.selYear   = null;\n        this.selMonth  = null;\n        this.selDay    = null;\n        this.selHour   = 12;\n        this.selMin    = 0;\n\n        // pre-fill if editing\n        if (opts.currentIso) {\n            var d = new Date(opts.currentIso);\n            if (!isNaN(d.getTime())) {\n                this.viewYear  = d.getFullYear();\n                this.viewMonth = d.getMonth();\n                this.selYear   = d.getFullYear();\n                this.selMonth  = d.getMonth();\n                this.selDay    = d.getDate();\n                this.selHour   = d.getHours();\n                this.selMin    = d.getMinutes();\n                this.$display.val(this._fmt(d));\n            }\n        }\n\n        this._bind();\n    }\n\n    // ── Format for display ────────────────────────────────────────\n    _fmt(d) {\n        var dd   = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');\n        var mm   = String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');\n        var yyyy = d.getFullYear();\n        var HH   = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');\n        var mn   = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');\n        if (this.isHr) {\n            return this.mode === 'datetime'\n                ? dd+'.'+mm+'.'+yyyy+' '+HH+':'+mn\n                : dd+'.'+mm+'.'+yyyy;\n        }\n        return this.mode === 'datetime'\n            ? mm+'/'+dd+'/'+yyyy+' '+HH+':'+mn\n            : mm+'/'+dd+'/'+yyyy;\n    }\n\n    // ── ISO for hidden input ──────────────────────────────────────\n    _iso(d) {\n        var yyyy = d.getFullYear();\n        var mm   = String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');\n        var dd   = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');\n        if (this.mode === 'datetime') {\n            var HH = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');\n            var mn = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');\n            return yyyy+'-'+mm+'-'+dd+'T'+HH+':'+mn;\n        }\n        return yyyy+'-'+mm+'-'+dd;\n    }\n\n    // ── Render calendar HTML ──────────────────────────────────────\n    _render() {\n        var MO_HR = ['Siječanj','Veljača','Ožujak','Travanj','Svibanj','Lipanj',\n                     'Srpanj','Kolovoz','Rujan','Listopad','Studeni','Prosinac'];\n        var MO_EN = ['January','February','March','April','May','June',\n                     'July','August','September','October','November','December'];\n        var DN_HR = ['Pon','Uto','Sri','Čet','Pet','Sub','Ned'];\n        var DN_EN = ['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'];\n\n        var months = this.isHr ? MO_HR : MO_EN;\n        var days   = this.isHr ? DN_HR : DN_EN;\n        var y = this.viewYear, m = this.viewMonth;\n\n        // first weekday of month, Mon=0\n        var fd = (new Date(y, m, 1).getDay() + 6) % 7;\n        var dim = new Date(y, m+1, 0).getDate();\n\n        var today = new Date();\n        var tY = today.getFullYear(), tM = today.getMonth(), tD = today.getDate();\n\n        var h = '<div class=\"dp-header\">'\n              + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-nav dp-prev\">&#8249;</button>'\n              + '<span class=\"dp-title\">' + months[m] + ' ' + y + '</span>'\n              + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-nav dp-next\">&#8250;</button>'\n              + '</div><div class=\"dp-grid\">';\n\n        days.forEach(function(d) { h += '<div class=\"dp-day-head\">'+d+'</div>'; });\n\n        for (var i=0; i<fd; i++) h += '<div class=\"dp-cell\"></div>';\n\n        for (var d=1; d<=dim; d++) {\n            var cls = 'dp-cell dp-day';\n            if (d===tD && m===tM && y===tY)           cls += ' dp-today';\n            if (d===this.selDay && m===this.selMonth && y===this.selYear) cls += ' dp-selected';\n            h += '<div class=\"'+cls+'\" data-d=\"'+d+'\">'+d+'</div>';\n        }\n        h += '</div>';\n\n        if (this.mode === 'datetime') {\n            h += '<div class=\"dp-time\">'\n               + '<span class=\"dp-time-label\">'+(this.isHr?'Vrijeme:':'Time:')+'</span>'\n               + '<input type=\"number\" class=\"dp-time-input dp-hour\" min=\"0\" max=\"23\" value=\"'\n               +    String(this.selHour).padStart(2,'0')+'\" />'\n               + '<span class=\"dp-time-sep\">:</span>'\n               + '<input type=\"number\" class=\"dp-time-input dp-min\" min=\"0\" max=\"59\" value=\"'\n               +    String(this.selMin).padStart(2,'0')+'\" />'\n               + '</div>';\n        }\n\n        h += '<div class=\"dp-footer\">'\n           + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-clear\">'+(this.isHr?'Očisti':'Clear')+'</button>'\n           + '<button type=\"button\" class=\"dp-ok btn btn-sm btn-primary\">'+(this.isHr?'Potvrdi':'OK')+'</button>'\n           + '</div>';\n\n        return h;\n    }\n\n    // ── Open / close popup ────────────────────────────────────────\n    _open() {\n        this.$popup.html(this._render()).show();\n        this._bindCal();\n    }\n    _close() { this.$popup.hide(); }\n\n    // ── Commit current selection ──────────────────────────────────\n    _commit() {\n        if (this.selDay === null) return;\n        var H = this.mode === 'datetime'\n            ? parseInt(this.$popup.find('.dp-hour').val()) || 0 : 0;\n        var M = this.mode === 'datetime'\n            ? parseInt(this.$popup.find('.dp-min').val())  || 0 : 0;\n        this.selHour = H; this.selMin = M;\n        var d = new Date(this.selYear, this.selMonth, this.selDay, H, M);\n        this.$display.val(this._fmt(d));\n        this.$hidden.val(this._iso(d));\n        // clear any validation message\n        this.$hidden.valid && this.$hidden.valid();\n    }\n\n    // ── Bind outer events ─────────────────────────────────────────\n    _bind() {\n        var self = this;\n\n        this.$display.on('click', function(e) {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n            if (self.$popup.is(':visible')) self._close();\n            else self._open();\n        });\n\n        // validate on blur\n        this.$display.on('blur', function() {\n            setTimeout(function() {\n                if (!self.$popup.is(':visible') && !self.$hidden.val()) {\n                    // trigger jQuery validate on the hidden field\n                    if ($.fn.validate) {\n                        self.$hidden.closest('form').validate().element(self.$hidden[0]);\n                    }\n                }\n            }, 200);\n        });\n\n        $(document).on('click.dp_' + this.fieldId, function() { self._close(); });\n        this.$popup.on('click', function(e) { e.stopPropagation(); });\n    }\n\n    // ── Bind calendar events (re-run after each re-render) ────────\n    _bindCal() {\n        var self = this;\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-prev').on('click', function() {\n            if (--self.viewMonth < 0) { self.viewMonth = 11; self.viewYear--; }\n            self.$popup.html(self._render()); self._bindCal();\n        });\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-next').on('click', function() {\n            if (++self.viewMonth > 11) { self.viewMonth = 0; self.viewYear++; }\n            self.$popup.html(self._render()); self._bindCal();\n        });\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-day').on('click', function() {\n            self.selDay   = parseInt($(this).data('d'));\n            self.selYear  = self.viewYear;\n            self.selMonth = self.viewMonth;\n            if (self.mode === 'datetime') {\n                // re-render to highlight + preserve time inputs\n                self.selHour = parseInt(self.$popup.find('.dp-hour').val()) || self.selHour;\n                self.selMin  = parseInt(self.$popup.find('.dp-min').val())  || self.selMin;\n            }\n            self.$popup.html(self._render()); self._bindCal();\n            if (self.mode === 'date') { self._commit(); self._close(); }\n        });\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-ok').on('click', function() {\n            self._commit(); self._close();\n        });\n\n        this.$popup.find('.dp-clear').on('click', function() {\n            self.selDay = self.selYear = self.selMonth = null;\n            self.$display.val(''); self.$hidden.val('');\n            self._close();\n        });\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LhHwGw5QXSQm6DG1QL1iB3"}
